IncidentLog.title: IncidentLog
IncidentLog.description: A log of a legacy tech smelting incident with flat fields (no arrays)

diagnosis.description: What failed and how badly (12 words max)

chromatic_profile.description: Diagnostic color palette name (4 words max)

system_dx.description: Compound clinical syndrome name (18 words max)

primary_contamination.description: Dominant visual or structural fault (5 words max)

failure_origin.description: What decisions produced this artifact (20 words max)

disposition.description: System recommendation referencing severity tier (18 words max)

archive_note.description: Evidence record, escalating to deadpan observation (60 words max)

share_quote.description: Prefilled social share text (14 words max)

timestamp.description: Server timestamp of when the incident was logged

breach_count.description: Number of containment breaches (shares, copies). Starts at 0, incremented by 1 per share action.

escalation_count.description: Number of user escalation votes. Starts at 0. One vote per user, toggleable.

sanction_count.description: Number of AI sanctions. Starts at 0. Gemini sanction job assigns 1 to the selected incident in each evaluated batch of 5.

sanctioned.description: True if this incident was sanctioned by the AI in its batch. Set by Admin SDK only.

sanction_rationale.description: Rationale string. Null if the incident has not yet been evaluated by the AI sanction job; non-null marker once evaluated (the AI rationale when sanctioned, or a 'not selected' / quarantine marker when not). Set by Admin SDK only.

total_pixels_melted.description: Total pixels melted across all incidents

/incident_logs/{logId}/escalations/{uid}.description: Per-user escalation vote tracking. Doc ID = anonymous auth UID. One doc per user per incident.
